signature_wines.name: F.X. Pichler Riesling Smaragd Kellerberg
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Racy, stony Smaragd Riesling from gneiss bedrock above Oberloiben. Slate mineral, lime zest and dried apricot on the nose; saline mineral and citrus pith on the palate with exceptional length.
signature_wines.description: Single-vineyard Riesling Smaragd from the Kellerberg Ried above Oberloiben. Slate mineral, lime zest and dried apricot with long ageing potential.

signature_wines.name: F.X. Pichler Grüner Veltliner Smaragd Loibenberg
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Full-bodied Smaragd Grüner Veltliner from the Loibenberg Ried: ripe stone fruit and white-pepper spice on a mineral backbone with persistent finish.
signature_wines.description: Full-bodied Smaragd Grüner Veltliner from the Loibenberg Ried: ripe stone fruit and white-pepper spice on a broad mineral backbone with persistent finish.

signature_wines.name: Emmerich Knoll Riesling Smaragd Loibenberg
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Benchmark Wachau Smaragd Riesling: ripe stone fruit, chalk mineral and bright acidity from Fuder ageing that rewards 8-12 years of bottle age.
signature_wines.description: Benchmark Smaragd Riesling from the Loibenberg Ried: apricot, chalk mineral and bright acidity. Fuder-aged; rewarding 8-12 years of bottle age.

signature_wines.name: Emmerich Knoll Riesling Smaragd Schütt
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Structured Smaragd Riesling from the Schütt Ried in Loiben: peach skin, chalk mineral and firm acidity with a long finish.
signature_wines.description: Structured Smaragd Riesling from the Schütt Ried above Loiben: Fuder-aged with stone-fruit depth, chalk mineral and firm, persistent acidity.

signature_wines.name: Prager Riesling Smaragd Achleiten
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Riesling Smaragd from the Achleiten Ried on amphibolite and gneiss: apricot, crushed granite and exotic spice with ripe stone fruit and firm acidity.
signature_wines.description: Prager Achleiten Riesling Smaragd from the celebrated amphibolite-gneiss Ried: apricot, crushed granite and exotic spice with firm, structured acidity.

verified.address_quoted: Wachaustrasse 48, A-3610 Weissenkirchen in der Wachau

signature_wines.name: Prager Grüner Veltliner Smaragd Wachstum Bodenstein
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Reserve selection Grüner Veltliner Smaragd from the Achleiten Ried's amphibolite parcels: intense concentration, pepper spice and stone fruit with very long mineral finish.
signature_wines.description: Reserve Grüner Veltliner Smaragd from Prager's select Achleiten parcels: intense pepper spice, concentrated stone fruit and exceptional mineral length.

verified.address_quoted: Wachaustrasse 48, A-3610 Weissenkirchen in der Wachau

signature_wines.name: Riesling Smaragd Singerriedel
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Granite-driven Riesling Smaragd from steep gneiss terraces above Spitz: white peach, crushed stone, citrus zest and dried apricot with crystalline acidity and persistent mineral finish.
signature_wines.description: Single-vineyard Riesling Smaragd from Hirtzberger's Singerriedel site on gneiss-granite terraces above Spitz; the estate's top Riesling expression.

signature_wines.name: Grüner Veltliner Smaragd Honivogl
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Full-bodied Grüner Veltliner Smaragd from the warm south-facing Honivogl site above Spitz: white pepper, ripe grapefruit and stone fruit with a long peppery finish.
signature_wines.description: Grüner Veltliner Smaragd from the warm south-facing Honivogl site above Spitz; classic white-pepper and stone-fruit character with full body.

signature_wines.name: Nikolaihof Vom Stein Riesling Smaragd
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Demeter-certified biodynamic Riesling Smaragd from the south-bank Vom Stein Ried: limestone mineral, lime blossom and herbal spice on a firm, austere palate with long mineral finish.
signature_wines.description: Demeter biodynamic Riesling Smaragd from the Vom Stein Ried: limestone mineral, lime blossom and herbal spice with firm acidity. Estate Demeter-certified since 1971.

signature_wines.name: Alzinger Riesling Smaragd Steinertal
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Mineral Smaragd Riesling from the Steinertal Ried in Unterloiben: primary-rock stone, lime oil and herbal spice on a taut, racy palate with extraordinary length.
signature_wines.description: Benchmark mineral Smaragd Riesling from Alzinger's Steinertal Ried: primary-rock stone, lime oil and herbal spice with racy acidity and exceptional length.

signature_wines.name: Riesling Smaragd Hochrain
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Rudi Pichler's top Riesling Smaragd from the Hochrain terraces above Wösendorf; full body, racy acidity and granite-mineral depth. A distinct Wösendorf expression, separate from the F.X. Pichler estate in Loiben.
signature_wines.description: Rudi Pichler's Riesling Smaragd from the Hochrain terraces above Wösendorf; full-bodied with racy acidity and granite-mineral character.

signature_wines.name: Riesling Smaragd Brandstatt
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Biodynamic Riesling Smaragd from ancient terraces above Spitz restored by Peter Veyder-Malberg from 2008. Old-barrel fermentation adds texture to the racy citrus and chalk-mineral profile.
signature_wines.description: Biodynamic Riesling Smaragd from the ancient Brandstatt terraces above Spitz by Peter Veyder-Malberg; chalk-mineral and citrus character with old-barrel texture.
